title: balanced armature speaker
description: This is using the device from the video power amplifier 4 to construct a balanced armature speaker. A low power device popular for radio in the 1920s right through to the 50s and still used today in hearing aids and sound powered telephones on ships - a fascinating device. The music used was supplied by music4yourvids.co.uk specifically for youtube content - commercial or not and is free of copyright or royalties.
